properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Windfall is not unlocked with this skin. Windfall can only be unlocked by completing Double or Nothing - the second Variant of the Rod of Seven Parts adventure in the Vecna: Eve of Ruin Campaign.

backstory.original: A dedicated champion of Tiamat, Windfall has been granted phenomenal power by her master. She is the proprietor of the Red Belvedere, a monument to Tiamat and a remnant of Avernus's original existence as a bucolic paradise designed to tempt mortals. Its edifice was destroyed in the carnage of the Blood War, but Windfall rebuilt the casino and rededicated it to the Dragon Queen as a celebration of her god's greed and vanity. Windfall is ostentatious and charismatic, making small talk with regular patrons and jovially welcoming new faces to the casino. She once plotted to assemble the Rod of Seven Parts to create a gift for her cruel goddess, but has instead joined the Champions at Tiamat's behest.
backstory.display: 温德福尔是提亚马特虔诚不二的拥护者，她的主人赋予了她非凡的力量。她是“绯红望台”的所有者，这座建筑不仅是提亚马特的纪念碑，更是阿弗纳斯曾经作为诱惑凡人的田园仙境的遗迹。它在血战的大屠杀中被摧毁，但温德福尔重建了这座赌场，并将它重新献给了龙女王，以此颂扬她神明的贪婪与虚荣。温法尔为人张扬炫耀，却又魅力四射，她会和常客闲聊，还会愉快地欢迎新面孔来到赌场。她曾谋划集齐“七节权杖”，为她残忍的女神献上一份厚礼，但如今却遵照提亚马特的命令加入了勇士们的行列。

description.original: Windfall attacks a random enemy for 1 hit.
description.display: 温德福尔攻击一个随机敌人 1 次。

description.original: Windfall deals 1 ultimate hit to all enemies, stunning them before slowing them.
description.display: 温德福尔对所有敌人造成 1 次杀招攻击，先将敌人眩晕，然后减速。

longDescription.original: Windfall's blinding coat erupts in a scintillating flash, dealing 1 ultimate hit to all enemies, stunning and then slowing them.
longDescription.display: 温德福尔耀眼的外表闪耀出夺目的光芒，对所有敌人造成 1 次杀招攻击，先将敌人眩晕，然后减速。

description.desc: Windfall can be used in any Vecna: Eve of Ruin campaign adventure or variant, even if she would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
温德福尔将可用于任何维克那：毁灭前夕战役冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。
Windfall increases the damage of all Champions in the column(s) with the most slots by $amount%. If multiple columns are tied for the most slots, then each of them are affected.
温德福尔会使栏位数量最多的列中所有勇士的伤害提升$amount%。如果有多列栏位数量并列最多，则这些列中的所有英雄都会受到影响。

tipText.original: Windfall increases the damage of all Champions in the longest column(s).
tipText.display: 温德福尔提高阵型中最长一列的（并列也可生效）所有勇士的伤害。

description.desc: When Windfall attacks and defeats an enemy, she gains a Raise stack. Otherwise, she gains a Call stack. Gold find is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Raise stack, stacking multiplicatively. Windfall's damage and The Long Game are both increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)% for each Call stack, stacking multiplicatively. Both are capped at 25 stacks and reset upon changing areas.
温德福尔攻击并击败敌人时，会获得一层“加注”，否则获得一层“跟注”。每有一层“加注”，金币获取量提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。每有一层“跟注”，温德福尔的伤害和“漫长赌局”效果都提升 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。“加注”和“跟注”最多叠加至 25 层，并且在更换区域时重置。

Windfall tries to avoid attacking enemies that don't drop gold or count for quest progress. Her normal attacks light her target on fire, dealing $amount___3 seconds of BUD-based damage to the enemy every second for $time___2 seconds.
温德福尔会避免攻击不掉落金币也不会计入任务进度的敌人。她的普通攻击会点燃目标，在 $amount___3 秒内，每秒对敌人造成持续 $time___2 秒的基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Windfall's attacks take on the aspect of a greedy red dragon.
specializationDescription.display: 温德福尔的攻击带有贪婪红龙的特质。

description.desc: Windfall gains the Control role and she prefers to attack stunned enemies. Her normal attacks are charged with lightning, striking out at up to two other random enemies, dealing $amount___3 seconds of BUD-based damage to them, and stunning all enemies damaged for 3 seconds.
温德福尔获得“控制”角色定位，并且会优先攻击被眩晕的敌人。她的普通攻击带有闪电能量，最多可以随机攻击另外两名敌人，造成持续 $amount___3 秒的基于基础杀招伤害的伤害，并使所有受到伤害的敌人眩晕 3 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Windfall's attacks take on the aspect of a shocking blue dragon.
specializationDescription.display: 温德福尔的攻击带有震撼蓝龙的特质。

description.desc: Windfall prefers to attack the farthest target. Her normal attacks exude a small cloud of poisonous gas around the target for 10 seconds. Enemies in the gas cloud take $amount___2 seconds of BUD-based damage every second while they are in the area.
温德福尔会优先攻击最远的目标。她的普通攻击会在目标周围产生一小团有毒气体，持续 10 秒。处于毒气云内的敌人在该区域内时，每秒会受到持续 $amount___2 秒的基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Windfall's attacks take on the aspect of a noxious green dragon.
specializationDescription.display: 温德福尔的攻击带有恶毒绿龙的特质。

description.desc: Windfall gains the Breaker role and she prefers to attack armored or hits-based enemies. Her normal attacks coat the target in Acid, dealing $amount___3 seconds of BUD-based damage and all successful attacks against those targets break an additional piece of armored or segmented health.
温德福尔获得“突破者”角色定位，并且会优先攻击有护甲或基于命中的敌人。她的普通攻击会为目标涂上酸液，造成持续 $amount___3 秒的基于基础杀招伤害的伤害，并且所有命中这些目标的攻击都会额外破坏一块护甲或一段生命条。

specializationDescription.original: Windfall's attacks take on the aspect of a vile black dragon.
specializationDescription.display: 温德福尔的攻击带有邪恶黑龙的特质。

description.desc: Windfall gains the Control role and she prefers to attack slowed enemies. Her normal attacks create a medium cloud of icy air for 5 seconds around the target. Enemies in the cloud take $amount___3 second of BUD-based damage every second while they are in the area and are slowed by 50%.
温德福尔获得“控制”角色定位，并且会优先攻击被减速的敌人。她的普通攻击会在目标周围产生一团中等大小的冰气云，持续 5 秒。处于该云内的敌人在该区域内时，每秒会受到持续 $amount___3 秒的基于基础杀招伤害的伤害，并且会被减速 50%。

specializationDescription.original: Windfall's attacks take on the aspect of a chilling white dragon.
specializationDescription.display: 温德福尔的攻击带有凌冽白龙的特质。

description.desc: Unlocks Windfall's Stunning Scintillation Ultimate Attack
解锁温德福尔的杀招“致晕光芒”

Windfall increases the effect of The Long Game by $(not_buffed amount)% for each adventure, variant, and Patron variant you have completed in the Vecna: Eve of Ruin campaign, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.stack_title: Vecna: Eve of Ruin Adventures Completed

description.desc: 对于你在维克那：毁灭前夕战役中所完成的每个冒险、支线任务和赞助者支线任务，温德福尔会使“漫长赌局”的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 已完成的“维克那：毁灭前夕”冒险

tipText.original: Windfall increases the effect of The Long Game for each adventure, variant, and Patron variant you have completed in the Vecna: Eve of Ruin campaign.
tipText.display: 对于你在维克那：毁灭前夕战役中所完成的每个冒险、支线任务和赞助者支线任务，温德福尔会使“漫长赌局”的效果提高 %。

description.original: Start a fight in my bar, and I'll be the one who finishes it.
description.display: 在我的酒吧里挑起事端，最后收拾局面的也会是我。

description.original: You have no idea what these hands can do. Try me.
description.display: 你根本不知道这双手能做些什么，来试试啊。

description.original: Pffft hahaha! Selfless!? ME!? Gods, that's hilarious. You're funny.
description.display: 噗哈哈哈！无私？我？天呐，太搞笑了。你可真有趣。

description.original: We all serve a greater purpose. I know mine. Now, do as I say.
description.display: 我们都为了更伟大的目标而战。我知道我的目标是什么。现在，照我说的做。

description.original: Hey! Welcome to the Red Belvedere! We have SO much to show you!
description.display: 嘿！欢迎来到绯红望台。我们有好多东西要展示给你看呢！

description.original: Oh sweetie, you thought I was your friend? Aww, that is so sad.
description.display: 哦，亲爱的，你以为我是你的朋友？哎呀，真让人难过。

description.original: If you're going to play the game, you have to learn to play it right.
description.display: 如果你要玩这个游戏，就得学会怎么玩得好。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

description.original: Know when to hold, when to fold, when to walk away, and when to run.
description.display: 懂得何时坚持，何时放弃，何时转身离开，以及何时拔腿就跑。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

description.original: Meeting me is literally the best thing to ever happen to you.
description.display: 能遇到我，绝对是你这辈子遇到的最棒的事。

description.original: It is done, my queen. I'm going back to hell for a drink and a spa day.
description.display: 事情办妥了，我的女王。我要回地狱喝上一杯，再享受一天水疗。

description.original: There are so many colorful ways to die. Let's begin.
description.display: 死法多种多样，花里胡哨。我们开始吧。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

description.original: I've lost count of the number of lives I've taken with this blade.
description.display: 我早已记不清这把剑下有多少亡魂了。

description.original: I'll leave you crying every day once I'm gone. Not sorry.
description.display: 等我走了，有你天天哭的时候。我一点也不感到抱歉。

description.original: When you grow up on the street, you learn to cut or be cut.
description.display: 在街头长大，要么学会捅人，要么就等着被捅。

description.original: The Cult of the Dragon took me in. Through them, I found my queen.
description.display: 龙巫教收留了我。通过他们，我找到了我的女王。

description.original: I outgrew the cult, and took to Avernus to worship my queen directly.
description.display: 我不再满足于龙巫教，于是前往阿弗纳斯直接敬奉我的女王。

description.original: She rewarded me with this on the day I opened the Red Belvedere.
description.display: 我的绯红望台开张那天，她把这把剑赏赐给了我。

description.original: I took this from a dying man. Taught myself how to play. It was easy.
description.display: 我从一位濒死之人那里拿到了这个。自学了怎么吹奏。很简单。

description.original: A little tune and a wink is all it takes to make most fools do whatever I want.
description.display: 只要吹上一段小曲，再抛个媚眼，就能让大多数蠢货乖乖照我的话做。

description.original: It's such a burden to be cursed with this much talent, beauty, and luck.
description.display: 如此多的才华、美貌和运气于一身，还真是一种负担啊。

description.original: The dirge it plays is the last sound you'll ever hear. Shall I?
description.display: 它弹奏的挽歌将是你听到的最后声音。要我来一曲吗？

description.original: The more you have, the more you want.
description.display: 拥有的越多，想要得就越多。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

description.original: Win a thousand of these and I'll let you into the VIP area. Maybe.
description.display: 要是你能赢到一千枚这种硬币，我或许会让你进入贵宾区哦。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

description.original: A gift from one of my many admirers. I fed them to a dragon.
description.display: 这是一位仰慕者送我的礼物。我把那个人喂给了一条龙。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

description.original: Tasked with a crusade to save the multiverse. What a pain.
description.display: 被委以拯救多元宇宙的重任，真是麻烦。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

description.original: Gross. Remind me to have someone flay the bartender.
description.display: 真难喝。提醒我找人扒了那个调酒师的皮。

description.original: Enough of this and your mouth goes numb. Aw, can't talk? Good.
description.display: 喝多了这个，你的嘴就会麻木。噢，说不出话了？很好。

description.original: Coagulated bottled bliss. Spicy and sweet. Just like me, right? Don't answer.
description.display: 装在瓶子里的凝固的极乐滋味。又辣又甜，就像我一样，对吧？别回答。

description.original: My favorite. This stuff gives you wings. No, literally. Drink up.
description.display: 我的最爱。这玩意儿能让你长出翅膀。不，说真的。喝吧。

description.original: We sell these in our gift shop, for anyone stupid enough to buy.
description.display: 我们在礼品店里把这些卖给那些蠢到会买的人。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

description.original: Tell a soul I sleep with this and no one will ever hear from you again.
description.display: 要是你敢告诉别人我抱着这个睡觉，你就别想再在世上露脸了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

description.original: If you want to be let into Dragon's Pride, you'll need to impress me.
description.display: 如果你想进入“龙之骄傲”，你得先让我刮目相看才行。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

description.original: All that I do is for your glory, my queen.
description.display: 我所做的一切都是为了您的荣耀，我的女王。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

description.original: It's all I had to keep me warm, until I learned how to get what I want.
description.display: 在我学会如何得到我想要的东西之前，这是我仅有的用来保暖的东西。

description.original: Song and dance are for children. Performance is an art. Watch and learn.
description.display: 唱歌跳舞那是小孩子才做的事。表演可是一门艺术。看着，学着点。

description.original: Jealous? Of course you are. I look exactly the way you wish you could.
description.display: 嫉妒了？你当然会嫉妒。我看起来就是你梦寐以求想要成为的样子。

description.original: Tailored just for me, and blessed by my queen. Stunning, I know.
description.display: 专门为我量身定制的，还受到了我女王的祝福。很惊艳吧，我知道的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a EVIL alignment

character_sheet_details.backstory: A dedicated champion of Tiamat, Windfall has been granted phenomenal power by her master. She is the proprietor of the Red Belvedere, a monument to Tiamat and a remnant of Avernus's original existence as a bucolic paradise designed to tempt mortals. Its edifice was destroyed in the carnage of the Blood War, but Windfall rebuilt the casino and rededicated it to the Dragon Queen as a celebration of her god's greed and vanity. Windfall is ostentatious and charismatic, making small talk with regular patrons and jovially welcoming new faces to the casino. She once plotted to assemble the Rod of Seven Parts to create a gift for her cruel goddess, but has instead joined the Champions at Tiamat's behest.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Windfall is a DPS, Support, and Gold Find Champion found in the second variant of the adventure "The Rod of Seven Parts" in the Vecna: Eve of Ruin campaign. She buffs the damage of all Champions in the longest column in the formation, and her attacks take on the draconic essence of the chromatic dragon of your choice. Once unlocked, you can find this Tiefling Bard in Seat 5 (Calliope).

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: Champion Windfall is not unlocked with this skin. Windfall can only be unlocked by completing Double or Nothing - the second Variant of the Rod of Seven Parts adventure in the Vecna: Eve of Ruin Campaign.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 温德福尔是提亚马特虔诚不二的拥护者，她的主人赋予了她非凡的力量。她是“绯红望台”的所有者，这座建筑不仅是提亚马特的纪念碑，更是阿弗纳斯曾经作为诱惑凡人的田园仙境的遗迹。它在血战的大屠杀中被摧毁，但温德福尔重建了这座赌场，并将它重新献给了龙女王，以此颂扬她神明的贪婪与虚荣。温法尔为人张扬炫耀，却又魅力四射，她会和常客闲聊，还会愉快地欢迎新面孔来到赌场。她曾谋划集齐“七节权杖”，为她残忍的女神献上一份厚礼，但如今却遵照提亚马特的命令加入了勇士们的行列。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 温德福尔是一名输出、辅助和金币寻获型勇士，可在“维克那：毁灭前夕”战役冒险“七节权杖”的第二个支线任务中找到她。她能增强阵型中最长一列的英雄的伤害，并且她的攻击会带有你所选择的彩色龙的龙之特性。解锁后，你可以在第 5 栏位找到这位提夫林吟游诗人（卡莉欧碧）。

properties.hero_not_unlocked_skin_warning: 勇士温德福尔不随此皮肤解锁。只有完成“要么翻倍，要么输光”——“维克那：毁灭前夕”战役中“七节权杖”冒险的第二个支线任务——才能解锁温德福尔。

display.specialization_description: 温德福尔的攻击带有震撼蓝龙的特质。

original.specialization_description: Windfall's attacks take on the aspect of a noxious green dragon.

display.name: 绿龙的怨恨
display.specialization_description: 温德福尔的攻击带有恶毒绿龙的特质。

display.name: 黑龙的腐蚀

display.name: 白龙的寒意
display.specialization_description: 温德福尔的攻击带有凌冽白龙的特质。

display.description: 在我的酒吧里挑起事端，最后收拾局面的也会是我。

display.description: 你根本不知道这双手能做些什么，来试试啊。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: Pffft hahaha! Selfless!? ME!? Gods, that's hilarious. You're funny.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 噗哈哈哈！无私？我？天呐，太搞笑了。你可真有趣。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: We all serve a greater purpose. I know mine. Now, do as I say.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我们都为了更伟大的目标而战。我知道我的目标是什么。现在，照我说的做。

original.name: Hustler
original.description: Hey! Welcome to the Red Belvedere! We have SO much to show you!

display.name: 骗子
display.description: 嘿！欢迎来到绯红望台。我们有好多东西要展示给你看呢！

original.name: Viper
original.description: Oh sweetie, you thought I was your friend? Aww, that is so sad.

display.name: 毒蛇
display.description: 哦，亲爱的，你以为我是你的朋友？哎呀，真让人难过。

original.name: Ante Up
original.description: If you're going to play the game, you have to learn to play it right.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

display.name: 加注
display.description: 如果你要玩这个游戏，就得学会怎么玩得好。

effects.description: 温德福尔的“赌徒”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Poker Face
original.description: Know when to hold, when to fold, when to walk away, and when to run.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

display.name: 扑克脸
display.description: 懂得何时坚持，何时放弃，何时转身离开，以及何时拔腿就跑。

effects.description: 温德福尔的“赌徒”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Proven Worth
original.description: Meeting me is literally the best thing to ever happen to you.

display.name: 证明价值
display.description: 能遇到我，绝对是你这辈子遇到的最棒的事。

original.name: Tiamat's Chosen
original.description: It is done, my queen. I'm going back to hell for a drink and a spa day.

display.name: 提亚马特选中的人
display.description: 事情办妥了，我的女王。我要回地狱喝上一杯，再享受一天水疗。

original.name: Razzle Dazzle
original.description: There are so many colorful ways to die. Let's begin.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

display.name: 花里胡哨
display.description: 死法多种多样，花里胡哨。我们开始吧。

effects.description: 使温德福尔的所有专精选择效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Weapon Master
original.description: I've lost count of the number of lives I've taken with this blade.

display.name: 武器大师
display.description: 我早已记不清这把剑下有多少亡魂了。

original.name: Drifter
original.description: I'll leave you crying every day once I'm gone. Not sorry.

display.name: 流浪汉
display.description: 等我走了，有你天天哭的时候。我一点也不感到抱歉。

original.name: Urchin's Knife
original.description: When you grow up on the street, you learn to cut or be cut.

display.name: 海胆匕首
display.description: 在街头长大，要么学会捅人，要么就等着被捅。

original.name: Occult Dagger
original.description: The Cult of the Dragon took me in. Through them, I found my queen.

display.name: 神秘匕首
display.description: 龙巫教收留了我。通过他们，我找到了我的女王。

original.name: Chromatic Rapier
original.description: I outgrew the cult, and took to Avernus to worship my queen directly.

display.name: 彩色西洋剑
display.description: 我不再满足于龙巫教，于是前往阿弗纳斯直接敬奉我的女王。

original.name: Queen's Blade
original.description: She rewarded me with this on the day I opened the Red Belvedere.

display.name: 女王之刃
display.description: 我的绯红望台开张那天，她把这把剑赏赐给了我。

original.name: Weathered Windpipe
original.description: I took this from a dying man. Taught myself how to play. It was easy.

display.name: 风化风笛
display.description: 我从一位濒死之人那里拿到了这个。自学了怎么吹奏。很简单。

original.name: Favored Flute
original.description: A little tune and a wink is all it takes to make most fools do whatever I want.

display.name: 受宠长笛
display.description: 只要吹上一段小曲，再抛个媚眼，就能让大多数蠢货乖乖照我的话做。

original.name: Lucky Lute
original.description: It's such a burden to be cursed with this much talent, beauty, and luck.

display.name: 幸运鲁特琴
display.description: 如此多的才华、美貌和运气于一身，还真是一种负担啊。

original.name: Harbinger's Harp
original.description: The dirge it plays is the last sound you'll ever hear. Shall I?

display.name: 先驱竖琴
display.description: 它弹奏的挽歌将是你听到的最后声音。要我来一曲吗？

original.name: Corrupting Token
original.description: The more you have, the more you want.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

display.name: 堕落信物
display.description: 拥有的越多，想要得就越多。

effects.description: 温德福尔的“赌徒”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Talon Coin
original.description: Win a thousand of these and I'll let you into the VIP area. Maybe.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

display.name: 利爪硬币
display.description: 要是你能赢到一千枚这种硬币，我或许会让你进入贵宾区哦。

effects.description: 温德福尔的“赌徒”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Tome of Leadership & Influence
original.description: A gift from one of my many admirers. I fed them to a dragon.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

display.name: 领导力与影响力之书
display.description: 这是一位仰慕者送我的礼物。我把那个人喂给了一条龙。

effects.description: 温德福尔的“赌徒”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: The Final Piece
original.description: Tasked with a crusade to save the multiverse. What a pain.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Windfall's The Gambler ability by $amount%

display.name: 最后的作品
display.description: 被委以拯救多元宇宙的重任，真是麻烦。

effects.description: 温德福尔的“赌徒”技能效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Fizzy Swill
original.description: Gross. Remind me to have someone flay the bartender.

display.name: 气泡劣酒
display.description: 真难喝。提醒我找人扒了那个调酒师的皮。

original.name: Salubra Slinger
original.description: Enough of this and your mouth goes numb. Aw, can't talk? Good.

display.name: 萨鲁布拉特调
display.description: 喝多了这个，你的嘴就会麻木。噢，说不出话了？很好。

original.name: Blazing Bloody Jack
original.description: Coagulated bottled bliss. Spicy and sweet. Just like me, right? Don't answer.

display.name: 烈焰血腥杰克
display.description: 装在瓶子里的凝固的极乐滋味。又辣又甜，就像我一样，对吧？别回答。

original.name: Joker's Sky
original.description: My favorite. This stuff gives you wings. No, literally. Drink up.

display.name: 小丑之空
display.description: 我的最爱。这玩意儿能让你长出翅膀。不，说真的。喝吧。

original.name: Cursed Doll
original.description: We sell these in our gift shop, for anyone stupid enough to buy.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

display.name: 诅咒玩偶
display.description: 我们在礼品店里把这些卖给那些蠢到会买的人。

effects.description: 使温德福尔的所有专精选择效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Tiawut Plush
original.description: Tell a soul I sleep with this and no one will ever hear from you again.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

display.name: 伪·提亚马特毛绒玩具
display.description: 要是你敢告诉别人我抱着这个睡觉，你就别想再在世上露脸了。

effects.description: 使温德福尔的所有专精选择效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Mark of Pride
original.description: If you want to be let into Dragon's Pride, you'll need to impress me.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

display.name: 傲慢印记
display.description: 如果你想进入“龙之骄傲”，你得先让我刮目相看才行。

effects.description: 使温德福尔的所有专精选择效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Tiamat Idol
original.description: All that I do is for your glory, my queen.

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Windfall's specialization choices by $amount%

display.name: 提亚马特神像
display.description: 我所做的一切都是为了您的荣耀，我的女王。

effects.description: 使温德福尔的所有专精选择效果提高 $amount%。

original.name: Street Cloak
original.description: It's all I had to keep me warm, until I learned how to get what I want.

display.name: 街头斗篷
display.description: 在我学会如何得到我想要的东西之前，这是我仅有的用来保暖的东西。

original.name: Performer's Cape
original.description: Song and dance are for children. Performance is an art. Watch and learn.

display.name: 表演者披风
display.description: 唱歌跳舞那是小孩子才做的事。表演可是一门艺术。看着，学着点。

original.name: Enchanted Robe
original.description: Jealous? Of course you are. I look exactly the way you wish you could.

display.name: 魔法长袍
display.description: 嫉妒了？你当然会嫉妒。我看起来就是你梦寐以求想要成为的样子。

original.name: Scintillating Tailcoat
original.description: Tailored just for me, and blessed by my queen. Stunning, I know.

display.name: 闪耀燕尾服
display.description: 专门为我量身定制的，还受到了我女王的祝福。很惊艳吧，我知道的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Female Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位女性勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
使所有提夫林勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 11 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a CON score of 13 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位体质大于等于 13 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a EVIL alignment
阵型中每有一位邪恶阵营勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
